message:
feat(fcp-conformance): expand vector generation and update test vectors

vecgen binary (src/bin/vecgen.rs):
  Major expansion of the conformance vector generator with new enrollment
  and simulation scenarios. Adds structured vector metadata, improved
  CBOR serialization, and coverage for edge cases in the protocol
  handshake and simulation request flows.

vecgen module (src/vecgen/mod.rs):
  Refine vector generation helpers to support the expanded scenario set.

Test vectors (CBOR files):
  Regenerate enrollment and simulation request vectors to match the
  updated generator output and expanded scenario coverage.

Cargo.toml: add dependency for expanded vector generation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ semver.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 jsonschema.workspace = true
 clap = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+ciborium.workspace = true
 
 # FCP crates (for types and encoding)
 fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
